justification: The issue describes a problem where `pd.array` does not preserve missing values from NumPy masked arrays, which is inconsistent with user expectations and how `pd.Series` handles such arrays.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed, but the problem described is still relevant and not addressed by any of the related open issues. The classification as 'documentation' was inferred from the title/body and available GitHub evidence.

related_issues.title: BUG: DataFrame.melt silently corrupts data on var_name output-name collisions
BUG:  `read_excel` with `usecols` still mangles column names when duplicates exist elsewhere in spreadsheet
